variant.description: Visual style for the launcher button.

imageUrl.description: Logo image rendered inside the launcher. Falls back to default chat icon if not set.

text.description: Label for variants that show text (bar, beacon, expand, spark).

align.description: Side of the screen the launcher is anchored to.

spacingCorner.description: Distance from the anchored side edge.

showTooltip.description: Show an idle tooltip near the launcher.

icon.description: Custom icon overriding the default chat icon.

buttonOnMobile.description: Force the simple icon variant on mobile when variant is bar/expand.

autoAnimate.description: Enable periodic animations on variants that support them (e.g., expand).

onClick.description: Click handler — toggles open/close state externally.
